meta.notes: Hints include content warnings, character names, and player names.

episodes.logline: Join us on a journey through the Napoleonic Wars, Regency fashion, and the intricate dance of high society as we meet our characters, from war-weary Captain John Stone to the cunning Miss Radcliffe. Experience the stormy carriage ride to Budleigh Manor and witness the alliances formed and secrets revealed as our guests navigate the complexities of an afternoon ball.

Join us as we unravel a mysterious encounter with a distraught woman in the forest. Our protagonists find themselves in the midst of a lively ballroom scene and engage in charming dance and conversation with various attendees. Will our investigators learn the nature of a "year without summer" and uncover the Budleigh family secrets, or succumb to the charms of the party?

Join us in this spine-chilling episode as we journey through a dark manor filled with hidden secrets. Our characters, Captain Stone, Miss Radcliffe, James, and Emma, split up to explore, uncovering ancient books and hidden passageways. Will they escape the horrific truths of the Budleigh family, or will they succumb to darkness? Tune in for a Cthulhu Regency adventure that will leave you on the edge of your seat.
Three residents of Blackshade home for women face a surprising and gruesome scene before breakfast.
Following the day's commotion, our three residents aim to learn move about Dr. Cave's rivalry with one of their fellows.
How deep does the mystery go within the cellars of Dr. Cave's surgery?
Walk the mean streets of Los Angeles 2037 with Willem Novak, Fenna, and Percival of the LAPD.
Hit the streets as Detectives Novak and Fenna interview witnesses at the Snake Pit.
Have a seat for your Voight-Kampff test as our detectives uncover more clues about what transpired at The Snake Pit.
The situation escalates as our detectives retrace Leah's steps.
The PD detectives start putting the pieces of the puzzle together.
A visit to the memory lab proves to be illuminating for our detectives.

There's trouble afoot in Junction, Texas, as the first half of our new posse arrives to join Dr. Bleeker's traveling medicine show. Eli the magician, Moni the acrobat, and Patience the sharpshooter quickly realize that things ain't quite right with these new folks they're performing for, and asking about it only leads to more questions.

As Eli decides what to do in the aftermath of his serpentine encounter, Patience and Moni deal with something going "bang" in the night before giving the townsfolk plenty of bang for their buck in an interesting audition. What the hell is happening in this town? How will this ragtag group come together in the end - or will they?

Our posse becomes more involved in the medicine show as they try to figure out their places in Junction. Chester and Julius make their debut performances, with varying results, as Julius finds a new nemesis and Chester continues to terrify the townsfolk. Eli explores the animal enclosures and avoids Pinky, while Moni and Patience finally meet with Dr. Bleeker to discuss their future with the show. Will Moni's fiery performance help or hinder her prospects? Is Dr. Bleeker's snake oil responsible for the strange goings-on in town? And most importantly, can anyone pet Chester without losing a hand?

Moni and Patience visit Lady Liggett the mystic to have their fortunes read before they officially join the Medicine Show. Meanwhile, Julius tries to get out of trouble, while Eli confronts Victor the snake handler and Chester has a very unsettling job interview with Dr. Bleeker. Will Moni pass her second interview to join the show? What are Bleeker's plans for Chester? And what in god's name is that unsettling screaming down near the tracks?

While Moni and Patience deal with the literal fallout from Junction's water stop crisis, Julius arrives in College Station on his mission for Professor Bleeker. New posse member Silas joins his quest through a chance encounter in a den of sin, and the two begin a dangerous romp through the tunnels beneath Texas Agricultural and Mechanical College. What's that strange chanting sound coming from the tunnels? Who is the mysterious Silas, anyway? And just what, exactly, is going on with Dr. Hackett and her...plants?

Back in Junction, Moni, Patience, Chester, and Eli receive assignments from Professor Bleeker, while in College Station, Julius and his new friend Silas break into the jail to try and rescue Dr. Hackett's son Ambrose. The jail is full of deadly secrets and strange folks, and even if the two posse members find their quarry, they may not like what they discover. What strange experiments are being done in the town jail? Can the posse trust anyone who offers them assistance? And can Julius get through an episode without accidentally killing someone?

Eli arrives in College Station to carry out his mission for Professor Bleeker, while Julius and Silas attempt to break out of the jail after their horrific discoveries. But getting out of jail may be more dangerous than going in, and there's no guarantee anyone will make it through this adventure alive. Will anyone at the opium den notice Silas is missing? What does Dr. Hackett really want with Ambrose? And what's up with all the rat's blood on the walls?

As Moni, Chester, and Patience set off towards El Capitan on their mission from Professor Bleeker, they discover an unlikely stowaway who might prove a help...or hindrance...down the line. A grisly discovery in the desert reveals something uncomfortable about Patience, while Moni exerts her charms over two feuding camps at the mountain itself. How many more times can Chester take being talked to like a dog? What are those strange, massive bones in the sand? And what eldritch secrets await the posse in the shimmering heat of the Texas desert?

Chester attempts to find out just what happened to the rest of his posse while also fending off the feuding professors and Jimmy. Moni and Patience find themselves in a strange, haunted place where memories of their pasts come back to trouble them, and where they may not make it out alive if they stick too closely to their principles. What’s with all the putrefying fish out in the desert? Where did Moni and Patience go? And…is that a whale?
Join the aftermath of our beach adventure and learn what happens to the university camps of El Capitan. Will Chester and Patience ever be able to leave? And what became of Moni?

Julius, Eli, and Silas left College Station and headed to Edgewater, Texas on Pinky's orders. They're a bit aimless, but need to find a man named Salvatore Barbosa. Will they be able to track him down before mob rule overruns this distressed port city?
Julius, Eli, and Silas navigate the fallout from Salvatore Barbosa's fate, seeking answers aboard a gambling boat named The Amber Rose.

Julius, Silas, and Eli find themselves in deep waters, figuratively and literally. Aboard a "borrowed" boat, they face deadly threats lurking beneath the waves. Will everyone make it back to the docks?

episodes.id: CastData:Bleeker Trails:For Better or For Worse
episodes.logline: The dust hasn’t settled for Moni and Patience. Back in Junction, Moni’s healing, but trouble keeps knocking. An unwelcome surprise, cryptic letters, and a familiar freak show act kick off a day that spirals into chaos. Who or what is pulling the strings?

Chester wakes up to find himself shaved and strapped with multiple mouths. A freak show doctor claims he’s trying to help but everything he says sounds dangerous. When science fails, something older takes its place.
The twisted threads of fate tighten around Junction. Patience gets caught in unsettling visions of El Paso. Moni spirals deeper into darkness. Secrets spill and blood flows as truths slowly unravel.
Junction spirals further into blood and chaos. Eli, Silas, and Julius reappear into a grisly crime scene, while Moni and Patience face terrifying reckonings of their own.

The group's arrival in Austin plunges them straight into deep waters. Patience, Eli, and Silas pursue Professor Grist and his grad student Lambert, attempting to uncover an artifact known as the dream stone. Haunted by nightmares, the posse faces dark forces emerging on the university campus.
Austin becomes the stage for schemes and revelations. Silas is dragged into a confrontation with his former Pinkerton partner. Across town, Eli and Patience crash Professor Grist’s grand unveiling.

The medicine show rolls into Austin. Patience uncovers grisly secrets in a luxurious hotel suite while Eli attempts to hypnotize truth out of the dead. It seems like no one is certain who’s still alive. This is the penultimate chapter of Bleeker Trails.

Julius, Patience, and Eli are swept into a nightmare of blood and steel as they chase the truth through a warped stockyard. Something ancient stirs as the boundaries between dream and waking collapse. Choices are made that can’t be undone.
What has become of Silas Jacobsen?
Tensions boil for sorority sisters at their Christmas party.
The sorority sisters learn the horrible truth about who is behind the prankish murders.

Three childhood friends are now working for a corporate resource conglomerate. They descend to a lifeless planet with one anomaly, a golden field of chiming orchids. Unsettling questions quickly arise.

The team’s unity fractures as the truth of their mission emerges. The Erebus Process isn’t just generating power. Does our trio stop the experiment, even if it costs them everything? Or is it already too late?

Stranded on a derelict ship with no way back for a month, the crew faces the grim reality of their situation. Why do they remember growing up on this ship? Survival might mean uncovering secrets best left buried.

The crew uncovers a terrifying truth... the ship isn't just haunted by memories, it's rewriting them. As they search for survivors and a way off the Transparency, their pasts begin to unravel, their identities shifting beneath them. Can they trust their own memories long enough to survive?

The team lands on a barren planet slated for evacuation, but something is wrong. As a mansion looms in the wasteland, the crew begins to question whether they're rescuing anyone at all or walking into a trap.
The crew pieces together the horrifying truth during an eerie dinner party and dancing. Can they escape before they forget why they need to?
The crew crash-lands on a strange, dead world once again. They encounter a crumbling mansion and fields of golden vegetation. The plants are watching. And every sunset brings something worse.

With nightfall approaching, the crew scrambles to survive in the twisting mansion. Now they must decide between destroying the world they were sent to fix, or joining the life blooming all around them.

The crew awakens aboard a legendary ship, surrounded by impossible beauty. Is this the future they were meant to make, or the past they were sent to stop? This mission could change everything. Or it already has.

Ten years vanish in an instant. The crew wakes up scattered across the Invisible Hand to deal with the ethical fallout of their past choices. As time fractures, what lengths will this crew go to in order to stop the spread?
The Carfax family sets out to visit their parents in Arkham when everything goes sideways in a blizzard near a small town gas station.
Will the Carfax family successfully rescue everyone at the diner and outwit the Dead Light themselves?
Join our investigators on a corporate retreat as they prepare to impress the mysterious Mister Ruiz.
Will one of our hopeful investigators join the executive board at Graves Corporation?

Join us in the van for a "seeker trip" through the Southwest in 1972, as we venture into the depths of a mysterious Arizona ghost town. In this episode, our investigators gather essential supplies at a local convenience store before embarking on their quest to uncover the rich lore and experience the mystical energy that surrounds the abandoned town. As the sun sets, prepare to be immersed in the stories and secrets of the past.

Our investigators dive deeper into the heart of the Arizona desert, seeking a profound connection with its ethereal energy through the ancient ritual of peyote. As they traverse the metaphysical landscape, they glimpse into the future, unearthing revelations about their path to new spiritual dimensions. Stay tuned for the next and final episode as they decipher these visions to reach uncharted planes of existence.

In the gripping finale of our three-part series, our investigators reach their destination - the ominous Death Cave. As they delve into the labyrinthine depths to unearth its ancient secrets, a ruthless biker gang is in relentless pursuit. Will they uncover the mysteries within before their pursuers catch up? Tune in to this terrifying conclusion to find out.

episodes.id: CastData:Diary of a Stranger:Diary of a Stranger - Xmas Improv
episodes.episode: Diary of a Stranger - Xmas Improv
episodes.logline: Four Christmas carolers shop for last-minute gifts in Badger, Minnesota on Christmas Eve. A "Push the Roll" improvised game incorporating suggestions by our Patreon members.
Four members of the prom committee begin the best night of their lives, maybe.
The love bug that's struck prom isn't just weird, it's dangerous! Our student investigators seek help.

episodes.id: CastData:Eclipse of the Heart:Take On Me
episodes.logline: Our student investigators confront the source of what is ruining their prom.
In Cosmic Dark, a brand new game from Graham Walmsley, our team of space workers experiences unsettling effects on the asteroid they are mining.
Tensions mount as the crew embarks on a rescue mission in this episode of Cosmic Dark.
Will our explorers survive or succumb to the asteroid or each other in this gripping Cosmic Dark finale?
Join our investigators who are scouting an abandoned factory as a new rehearsal space for their experimental band.
Join our investigators who learn more about the strange machinery in the factory and its purpose.

On this Ain't Slayed Nobody mini-arc: the ASN crew and guest Keeper Scott Dorward tackle the cosmic horrors of 19th century Scotland in Cthulhu Dark. Bill McDonald and his family arrive back in their ancestral homeland in the Scottish highlands, ready to take up a new life as homesteaders. But the family quickly discovers that something isn't quite right in woods around their new home, and a little harmless exploration may prove deadly. Is the house haunted? What is that strange laughter coming from the woods? And, more importantly, will anyone manage to survive Scott Dorward's first episode?

Bill McDonald and his family try to settle into their new jobs after a traumatizing first night at Linty Farm. Cryptic comments from the townsfolk build the tension for our party, and it soon becomes clear that fear and terror are the order of the day in Cullingstone. What is wrong with the children in this town? Is Maggie safe? What unimaginable horrors lurk in the woods? And will Ol' McDonald live to have his farm?

The night is dark and full of terrors for the McDonald family as their encounters with the cosmic horrors of Fairyland draw to their conclusion. The tenuous sanity holding the family to reality grow ever weaker as they learn the truth about the town's children and come face to face with their own nightmares. Is Maggie safe? Will anyone survive Fairyland? And worse...do they even want to?
Four members of George Washington's Culper Spy Ring investigate a mysterious arrival which leads them to a small town in the woods.
Our group of spies may learn more about Dandy Jack if they are able to curb their insatiable appetites.
The investigators seek answers in the shadows of the church. What, and who, will they find?
The source of Shiloah's troubles reveals itself to the investigators, but will they have the power or will to stop it?
Private detective Max Hammett and their assistant Harry Devlin, with Highball in tow, follow a case to a mysterious hotel near San Francisco with new friends Penni and Nellie.

It’s Halloween night 1928, two years after the death of Harry Houdini. A séance at a manor takes a chilling turn when the guests make contact with what might be Houdini’s spirit. Their search for proof leads them into the dark heart of Detroit’s theater district. Nothing about this night feels like an illusion, no matter how much they wish it were.
The investigation into Houdini’s final mystery leads our unlikely heroes from the theater to Detroit’s Grace Hospital, where things take a terrifying turn.
The investigators’ pursuit of Houdini’s secrets leads them into a mortuary and onward to the Statler Hotel, where sanity cracks.
A group of travel influencers meet at a lakeside resort where everything seems off.
The visitors to Lakeview realize this resort is more uncanny than they originally thought.
Our Lakeview visitors experience the resort in all of its glory.
Something strange is happening in a Toronto suburb at this Sunday afternoon cookout.
The couples and Lenny struggle to reconcile their past misdeeds.

In this Session Zero, the crew builds Lone Canyon where a community college and a pawn shop sit in the shadow of a fading dynasty. Players settle into their beautifully messy Monsterhearts skins. This game is awkward, hilarious, sexy, and dangerous. If all that sounds good, you're in the right spot.

Lunch at Lone Canyon Community College gets weird fast. Awkward flirting is just the beginning. CeCe uncovers something she absolutely should not have and TJ learns an important new lesson about human behavior.

CeCe gets answers from Nathan and somehow leaves with even more questions. Ezra receives instructions from Sam that are way worse than his gummies. And Dana discovers that friendship advice from Ezra might not be the best strategy. Meanwhile, TJ is about to find himself in deep trouble.

CeCe decides to follow a lead and gets way closer to the truth than she probably should. Ezra tries to hold things together while everything around him gets worse, and Dana’s plans for friendship are getting complicated.
Join our investigators as the inspect their new art installment dedicated to the lost colony of Roanoke.
Our investigators grow wary of the strange rain and decide to seek medical attention for a member of the crew.

episodes.id: CastData:Mask of Desire:Mask of Desire: Max Hammett Mysteries V3
episodes.episode: Mask of Desire: Max Hammett Mysteries V3
episodes.logline: New friends add new complications to the lives of private detective Max Hammett and their assistant Harry Devlin. Follow them in strange pursuit of answers regarding a mysterious mask in New York City. Based on the one-on-one Call of Cthulhu scenario "Mask of Desire" from "Does Love Forgive?"

Immerse yourself in another improvised Call of Cthulhu podcast, where our investigators play the creative minds behind Fathom Films, a powerhouse in 1970s British Public Information Films. What happens when fear is more than just a theme and becomes the assignment? As the line between fabricated horror and real terror blurs, how will our heroes cope when the script becomes reality?

The investigators at Fathom Films carry on with their mandate from the Minister to revolutionize British Public Information Films. Will they be able to reconcile with the horrors they've created in pursuit of cinematic realism? Or will their resolve shatter under the weight of their creations?

In our climactic ending, the film crew grapples with their final assignment involving a double-decker bus in the heart of a bustling public square. Confronted with the critical choice between subverting their plan for the greater good or playing into the Minister's hand, which path will they choose? Come navigate the intrigue, fear, and deception of our last act.
Three promising artists arrive at the ferry terminal on their way to the prestigious Miskatonic Shoreside Conservatory.
warnings: Automobile sounds (light horns, tire skid, impact)

episodes.logline: Our three prodigies are ferried across the bay to the island home of the Miskatonic Shoreside Conservatory.

episodes.id: CastData:Miskatonic Shoreside Conservatory:Seek the Highest Limit
episodes.logline: The newest students arrive at Miskatonic Shoreside Conservatory and take inventory of their living quarters.
Students take part in the bonfire initiation before classes begin.

episodes.id: CastData:Miskatonic Shoreside Conservatory:When We Needed Saving
episodes.logline: The new students are introduced to their personal performance studios.
The students explore the Hall of Memories in the aftermath of their practices.
Students are beginning to deteriorate under the weight of the program.
Miskatonic Shoreside Conservatory's students face their final test.

In this riveting new Call of Cthulhu podcast, our investigators encounter a new member during a group therapy session. Is this young woman the key to their closure following the brutal acts inflicted upon their loved ones, or is she the harbinger of a fresh bout of unimaginable horror? Tune in to unravel the mystery.
Our trio of investigators plus Annie arrive at the shack. Is this the same cabin where their relatives were found dead? Unravel the mysteries of this shack in the woods, if you dare!
The situation is dire inside the cabin as our surviving investigators try to find a way out.

While on the late night bus home in London’s east end, Freddy, Gracie, and Jake find themselves and their fellow passengers drawn into a mysterious other dimension when the bus suddenly crashes in the middle of nowhere. With tensions already high, the agitation and frustration grows as everyone attempts to work out what the hell just happened…and how to get home. Will anyone make it out of the bus? How did another dimension end up in Penge? And dear god, what is that thing?

The surviving passengers on the night bus attempt to flee the burning vehicle as something inexplicably horrible pursues them. But the landscape around them is unfamiliar and inhospitable, and they may find that the horrors behind them pale in comparison to what lies ahead. What caused the bus to crash? Who brought them here? And what’s with the ominous stone fist in the middle of the desert?

After encountering the strange life forms that…live?...in this other world, the survivors now have more questions than they have answers, and at least one of them appears to be missing their body. With time running out, they all try desperately to get themselves back home, whatever the cost. What does the mysterious entity in Gracie’s body want? What’s with the glowing crystal balls? And who’s going to be the first to try to murder Freddy?

episodes.id: CastData:Of Sorrow And Clay:Take Me Home
episodes.logline: Deep in the Appalachian mountains, the adult Taft children Lorelei, Pistol, Blair, and Faith reunite at the old homestead to search for their missing father. Surrounded by memories and moonshine, the siblings uncover family secrets and old half-truths that some would prefer stay buried in the roots of their childhood home. What secrets will they learn about their family out amidst the trees?

The Taft siblings strike deeper into the dark woods of the holler in search of their missing Pa. Dark truths are unearthed and the family roots are untangled as they speak to Jinny, the wise witch, and follow the strange tracks to the bog. But some secrets are too much to bear, and the siblings may wish they'd let the past die there amidst the trees. What horrors await them in the bog? What really happened to Sadie, their Pa's first wife? And will they ultimately find their answers all too late?
A society of pseudoscientists gathers to solve the mystery of a missing staff member.
The investigators stumble upon a discovery made by other scientists in the society.
The investigators explore the dangerous world beyond the portal.

A doctor, a lieutenant, a pastor, and a professor attend a group therapy session to address strange and disturbing events from their recent pasts. Will the facilitator be able to help our group through their issues, or will the past be too heavy to overcome?
Our participants will discover that this program offers more than they bargained for. Will they finally confront their fears? Will they survive group therapy?

episodes.id: CastData:She Moves Backwards:The Power of Cinema
episodes.logline: Our investigators partake in private screenings and castle exploration, some more willingly than others.

episodes.id: CastData:She Moves Backwards:Fire in a Theater
episodes.logline: Our investigators realize their role in the private screening is more than they bargained for.

episodes.id: CastData:Somebody Think of the Children:The Devil Went Down to Missouri
episodes.episode: The Devil Went Down to Missouri
episodes.logline: A group of concerned mothers seek to curb the devil's influence on their children.

episodes.id: CastData:Somebody Think of the Children:Grave Concerns
episodes.logline: The mothers interrogate just about everyone to figure out what's corrupting the town's children.

episodes.id: CastData:Somebody Think of the Children:Way Down in the K-hole
episodes.logline: The mothers uncover the town's secrets in a 'haunted' house.
''The Between'' is a tabletop roleplaying game about a group of mysterious monster hunters in Victorian-era London.

episodes.id: CastData:The Between:The St. James's Street Ghost
episodes.logline: ''The Between'' continues with our monster hunters investigating claims that the townhouse at 18 St. James's Street is haunted. A young maid, Ginny Hess, was found dead—apparently from shock—in her employer’s home some months ago.
''The Between'' enters the Night Phase where our monster hunters reveal more about their true selves and the investigation goes dark.
The hunters at Hargrave House embark on a new day of vulnerability and investigation, including a new Threat called The Limehouse Lurker.
Limehouse brings new friends to Ms. Archer and Mr. Melmoth while Ms. Innes and Mr. Kessler go see about a baby.

episodes.id: CastData:The Between:A Night at the Opera
episodes.logline: The night phase takes Mr. Melmoth to the opera while Miss Archer deals with a returning menace.
Viola and Moyra begin to explore beautiful Cremorne Gardens while Roland takes Sebastian to meet a friend in a den of depravity.
Sebastian faces a worthy adversary thanks to Roland's introduction. Moyra and Viola enjoy the fountains at the garden.
The Hunters have big plans for a night of dancing and bowling, until...
The Day Phase spreads the Hunters across London, as they track down clues for open mysteries while a new Pinkerton threat is introduced.
The Hunters split up in all directions to gain more clues in the next phase of investigation. The dice had other ideas.
The Hunters attempt to resolve two major threats during the first extended night phase of the campaign.
Miss Innes and the little old vampire settle their fates while Mr. Melmouth makes the St. James Street ghost an offer.
The Hunters set off to investigate a new threat and dig into the Pinkerton situation.
Ms. Archer takes the lead on investigating the Figg's Pigs threat.
The night phase brings an investigation at the docks, changes to Mr. Melmoth's masterwork, and surprises at Hargrave House.

episodes.id: CastData:The Between:The Cat and the Viper
episodes.logline: The hunters make progress on the Figg's Pigs investigation using varied approaches.

Hargrave House is still reeling as the hunters face the fallout from the transformation. A new arrival (sort of), Edward Quiet, steps into the chaos as London begins whispering about the new monster's wake.
London gets stranger by the minute as the investigators split up and follow different threads. A ghost returns where it shouldn’t and strange bargains are struck.
The night phase begins badly as long-buried hungers come to the surface. What is the cost of clarity?
Morning breaks over Hargrave House, but the night’s consequences remain. Old wounds reopen and new obsessions bloom as something wicked is arriving in London.
warnings: discussion of abortion and forced infertility

episodes.logline: Hargrave House doing what it does best, being a haunted disaster with rules nobody follows. Kew Gardens turns into a green fever-dream, and everyone’s acting a little planted.
As night falls, secrets surface in gardens, kitchens, and places London prefers not to notice. Everyone makes plans that feel sensible right up until they aren’t.

A night at the theater spirals sideways as everything seems to collide at once. Everyone is watching something they don’t fully understand, and the cost of looking too closely starts to become clear. London feels smaller by the end of it. The walls are closing in on the hunters.
A new threat settles over London, and it’s not subtle. The house splits up to chase leads. Strings are being pulled and it’s getting harder to tell who’s in control anymore.
A tarot reading goes very wrong, a promise of trust turns intimate, and Mr. Melmouth's play begins to change for someone it was never meant to welcome.
A full moon pulls everyone in different directions, and nothing waits to be dealt with later. Old rituals resurface and something monstrous finally breaks loose.
warnings: references to child neglect and abuse

episodes.logline: Things in Hargrave House feel off, even more than usual. While everyone chases their own strange leads, something bigger keeps quietly unfolding in the background. It’s a little hard to tell who's making things better or worse.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:Sympathy For The Devil
episodes.logline: World War Cthulhu: London is about meeting new friends along the way.
World War Cthulhu: London is about finding and exploring new places.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:Oh No, Not You Again
episodes.logline: World War Cthulhu: London is about honesty and revisiting old friends.
World War Cthulhu: London is working as a team.
Our investigators try to move on to the next phase by tying up some loose ends with their contacts.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:You Can't Catch Me
episodes.logline: Irene receives a new visitor at the school while Davey and Cyril make a risky decision during the air raid.
Irene visits with a new high-level connection while Cyril and Davey catch up on rest at the school.
Irene receives a shipment from her new friends along with a special visitor. Davey and Cyril attempt to explain their suspicious behavior.
Irene finishes her procedure as the boys take stock of the new shipment. The mortician helps everyone suss out the inventory before a meeting with the big guy.
Davey and Cyril attempt to kidnap a ghoul from the Shoulder of Mutton.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:You Can't Always Get What You Want
episodes.episode: You Can't Always Get What You Want
episodes.logline: Following a botched kidnapping, the gang turns to more desperate measures.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:Blue Turns to Grey
episodes.logline: The gang reunites with old friends.
The gang is stuck between a rock and a hard place.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:Don't You Lie To Me
episodes.logline: Will the gang be able to placate Tiny Steven?
The gang teams up with an unlikely ally to solve London's problems.
The gang tries to address the Frankie problem.
The gang heads to a lockup where they hope to finally obtain a ghoul for Tiny Steven.
There's a great big fire and the gang is running low of safehouses.

episodes.id: CastData:The Meat Trade:Time Is on My Side
episodes.logline: The gang heads to a lockup where they hope to finally obtain a ghoul for Tiny Steven.
The gang spends more struggle time in the school's basement.
The gang aims to take over a shipment heading for the Shoulder of Mutton.
The gang continues their efforts to deliver something, anything, to the Shoulder of Mutton.
Join the gang for the final episode of The Meat Trade.

Deep One hybrid teenagers take part in a ceremony known as The Smolting, in which groups of Innsmouth youth set out into the larger human world for a couple of months to learn their ways, and maybe find a suitable mate to bring back and stop the gene pool from getting too shallow.
Four witnesses to a suicide in Arkham are pulled into a bizarre investigator.
Four strangers have come together to solve a mystery. They investigate the family home and an apartment over the bookshop.
Tensions mount at The Longdale House as our investigators are attacked on multiple fronts.

episodes.id: CastData:The Witch Is Dead:The Witch Is Dead
episodes.logline: The witch is dead and her familiars seek revenge in distant lands.

episodes.id: CastData:The Bread Is Rising:The Magic of Christmas
episodes.logline: This take on Cthulhu Dark known as "Dark Meat" brings the holidays to Ain't Slayed Nobody with GM and system author Graham Walmsley.
The kids try to figure out what happened to their parents while the bread attacks.

In this 1980s Halloween scenario, three middle school friends accept a spooky dare to stay overnight in the Old Barnaker Place. Will they be able to track down and protect their club’s biggest secrets? And is neighborhood bully Roger their main worry?
The Trouble Trio continues to search the Barnaker House for their stolen secrets. What happened to Roger and what secrets lie behind the doors of the rooms upstairs?

episodes.id: CastData:The Dare:The Spider And The Flies
episodes.logline: Will the Trouble Trio make their last stand inside the Barnaker House, or will they find their secrets and escape to the safe grounds of rural Delaware?
warnings: Insects (centipedes, maggots, flies, beetles, spiders, etc.)

episodes.logline: Team Siblengs meets a potential new member for their journey to Leng.
The team finds themselves in a strange land inhabited by creatures the size of trucks or busses.
The team decides whether to interfere with the conflict they caused or find passage to the mountains.
The team attempts to capture a baby mountain.
A team of paranormal investigators gathers to honor their fallen friend, Wilhelm Vogler. When Wilhelm unexpectedly returns, the group faces unsettling truths. Can they trust what they see?
Things turn sinister as Wilhelm's return unsettles the group. Dreams blur with reality and sanity unravels. Can the investigators discover what's truly binding their ghostly friend to this world?
The investigators face devastating truths as Wilhelm tears the group apart. Can they sever Wilhelm's hold once and for all or will his dark plans consume them?

Scott Dorward is our Keeper of Arcane Lore for this special two-part Halloween Improv game of Call of Cthulhu. A family vacationing in Maine during Halloween encounters a totally-not-a-cult gathering.

The conclusion of our two-part Halloween Special for 2021. Scott Dorward is our Keeper of Arcane Lore for this special two-part Halloween Improv game of Call of Cthulhu. A family vacationing in Maine during Halloween encounters a totally-not-a-cult gathering.

On this special mini-arc of Ain't Slayed Nobody: A long-shuttered amusement park with a scandalous past proves irresistible for our team of parkour enthusiasts looking to go viral. Flips and tricks abound as J0ns3y, Maxx, Kevin, and Jason film and bicker their way into a light bit of breaking and entering. What secrets lie beyond the shuttered gates of the Funland amusement park? What secrets are our protagonists hiding, even from each other? And how long can the investigators test the GM's patience before he shoves them into the park himself?
warnings: Discussion of child murder and death

episodes.logline: Our investigators are pulled ever deeper into UNLAND, where new terrors await them at every turn. The familiar becomes the horrible as they quickly learn nothing - and no one - is what it seems. What's that in the mirror? Where's the exit? And does splitting the party ever lead to any good for anyone?
warnings: Discussion of child murder and death

episodes.logline: Our investigators come to some terrifying conclusions as their ill-fated adventure in UNLAND finally ends (or does it?). Lives are shattered as easily as mirrors as dark truths come to light and reality proves only skin deep in this place. What is dead may never die, especially in UNLAND, and our parkour enthusiasts may learn that some things are, perhaps, even worse than death. What truths await the investigators at the end of the ride? Who will leave the park and who will stay? What horrors still lurk in the shadows? The truth will come out. One way or another.
warnings: Discussion of child murder and death

episodes.logline: In this gothic horror Call of Cthulhu game, our investigators are part of a family-run funeral home.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Horror at the Innsmouth Inn:Horror at the Innsmouth Inn part 1
episodes.episode: Horror at the Innsmouth Inn part 1
episodes.logline: A beauty sales convention at a remote Maine inn turns into something stranger than a weekend of pep talks. As the players improvise their way through an early 1980s Call of Cthulhu setup, awkward social pressure and guilt bleed together.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Horror at the Innsmouth Inn:Horror at the Innsmouth Inn part 2
episodes.episode: Horror at the Innsmouth Inn part 2
episodes.logline: A conference stay turns strange as late night conversations spiral into things that don’t quite line up. The inn itself feels wrong as pressure mounts and reality slips. It becomes harder to tell who’s awake, who’s dreaming, and who might already be lost.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Horror at the Innsmouth Inn:Horror at the Innsmouth Inn part 3
episodes.episode: Horror at the Innsmouth Inn part 3
episodes.logline: An MLM retreat turns even stranger when the unsettling details refuse to stay in the background. The group realizes this night isn't just dangerous... it's personal. Dreams bleed into reality and whatever is waiting at the center is very patient.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Old Girlfriends Never Die:Old Girlfriends Never Die 1/3
episodes.logline: A group of old friends reunite for a funeral in a quiet Connecticut town, but something about the past feels wrong.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Old Girlfriends Never Die:Old Girlfriends Never Die 2/3
episodes.logline: The Secret Attic Society reunites after a funeral, but the past doesn’t come back the way you expect. It kind of feels like they’ve done all this before.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Old Girlfriends Never Die:Old Girlfriends Never Die 3/3
episodes.logline: The girls finally start to remember what they did and why they tried to forget. Dreams and reality blur. And something on the other side is offering them a tempting choice.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space:Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space 1/3
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space.lua
episodes.show: Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space
episodes.episode: Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space 1/3
episodes.logline: A small crew wakes from cryosleep to begin an isolated research mission at the far edge of explored space. Out here, with nothing but darkness beyond the stars, what could possibly go wrong?
warnings: discussion of killing animals for food

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space:Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space 2/3
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space.lua
episodes.show: Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space
episodes.episode: Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space 2/3
episodes.logline: A corporate deep-space expedition lands on a distant moon looking for evidence of ancient life. The deeper they look the more it feels like they’ve stepped into someone else’s territory.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space:Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space 3/3
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space.lua
episodes.show: Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space
episodes.episode: Outpost at the Edge of Dark Space 3/3
episodes.logline: Something goes very wrong on a remote outpost when the crew starts noticing doubles. It's honestly hard to tell what’s real anymore.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Push the Roll with Ross Bryant:What is ''Push the Roll with Ross Bryant''?
episodes.show: Push the Roll with Ross Bryant
episodes.episode: What is ''Push the Roll with Ross Bryant''?
episodes.logline: This episode is our “what the heck is this show?” moment. If you’re new here or just want to hang out with Ross, Paula, and cup while we talk about what makes PTR tick, this is for you. We explain how Patreon-suggested titles become the heart of each tabletop roleplaying series, what happens when we “push the roll” midway through, and why we think this show will keep you guessing and laughing all the way through. Near the end, we even roll for a listener suggested title to show you how the openings of these episodes work.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Side Effects May Include...:Side Effects May Include... part 1
episodes.logline: Join Ross Bryant and special guest Colton Dunn for an improvised Call of Cthulhu adventure about a clinical sleep trial that already feels a little too good to be true. The weirdness starts creeping in almost immediately.
warnings: fear of kidnapping and sex trafficking

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Side Effects May Include...:Side Effects May Include... part 2
episodes.logline: The sleep study gets a whole lot weirder as everyone beds down for the night. By morning nothing feels quite right and one participant mysteriously vanishes. Everyone is pretty sure this study isn’t what they signed up for.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Side Effects May Include...:Side Effects May Include... part 3
episodes.logline: The group’s plan to gather evidence collapses almost immediately, sending everything into chaos. The line between waking life and nightmare logic continues to blur.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right?:Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right? part 1
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains Right.lua
episodes.show: Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right?
episodes.episode: Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right? part 1
episodes.logline: A group of teenage employees get stuck on the night shift at a run-down 1980s water park. Huh, the drains aren’t behaving the way drains are supposed to. It’s summer, it’s humid, and something in the pool filters might be listening.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right?:Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right? part 2
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains Right.lua
episodes.show: Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right?
episodes.episode: Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right? part 2
episodes.logline: A late shift at a rundown water park turns weird fast when something in the drains starts reaching back. Goofing off after hours slips into something dark, and by the time anyone realizes they should’ve left, it might be too late.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right?:Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right? part 3
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains Right.lua
episodes.show: Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right?
episodes.episode: Stuff Is Supposed To Go Down Drains, Right? part 3
episodes.logline: A group of teen water park employees discover something living in the drains. The park seems to be waking up around them. And whatever is in the water isn’t done with them yet.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster:The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster part 1
episodes.episode: The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster part 1
episodes.logline: The class of 1931 returns to Miskatonic University for a Halloween reunion in 1951. Old classmates reunite and stir up memories that won’t stay buried. A scavenger hunt leads them into the haunted halls of campus. Has the past been waiting for them all along?

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster:The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster part 2
episodes.episode: The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster part 2
episodes.logline: A reunion at Miskatonic University takes a turn as old memories resurface. The nostalgic scavenger hunt quickly unravels into cosmic terror for our investigators. Things are about to get wet, weird, and deeply unsettling.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster:The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster part 3
episodes.episode: The 1931 Miskatonic University Reunion Disaster part 3
episodes.logline: As the Miskatonic University reunion spirals out of control, strange forces awaken in the campus natatorium. The investigators face impossible choices as something ancient rises. Will anyone answer its call?

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Butterfly Factory:The Butterfly Factory part 1
episodes.logline: A late-60s New York art scene full of beautiful frauds and very bad vibes comes together around a special party invitation. Fame feels close. But so does something colder watching from just offstage. Everyone’s chasing the next big thing, and it’s unclear what that might turn out to be.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Butterfly Factory:The Butterfly Factory part 2
episodes.logline: An exclusive after-hours party slips past midnight and straight into something stranger and much harder to walk away from. Art becomes an experience and everyone is a little too willing to participate. Nobody’s quite sure what they're witnessing. Only that it means something.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Day We Met?:The Day We Met? part 1
episodes.logline: The cast dives headfirst into an improvised romantic comedy. What starts as quirky New Yorkers juggling careers and love lives begins to spiral. Maybe, just maybe, the universe has bigger plans than anyone expects.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Day We Met?:The Day We Met? part 2
episodes.logline: Our investigators step into the gleaming halls of Keystone Tower. Strange architecture blurs the line between reality and illusion. Nothing about this visit goes quite as planned.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Day We Met?:The Day We Met? part 3
episodes.logline: We’re back in a place where the angles don’t make sense and neither do our choices. Luck just keeps running out inside this weird geometry. Feelings get messy and something impossible squeezes its way into the night.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Obverse of the Mirror:The Obverse of the Mirror part 1
episodes.episode: The Obverse of the Mirror part 1
episodes.logline: In this Call of Cthulhu TTRPG one-shot, the group dives into a story set in Victorian England. A croquet champion, an occult shopkeeper, a Pinkerton agent, and a decadent artist find themselves drawn into the orbit of a strange aristocrat with a disturbing new acquisition. What begins as witty banter over beauty and decadence soon takes a darker turn into psychological horror when the artifact is unveiled.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Obverse of the Mirror:The Obverse of the Mirror part 2
episodes.episode: The Obverse of the Mirror part 2
episodes.logline: In this actual play episode, the group goes all in on a séance, but things don’t exactly go as planned . The mirror has its own secrets, and soon enough, they’re up against eldritch horror they can barely comprehend.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Obverse of the Mirror:The Obverse of the Mirror part 3
episodes.episode: The Obverse of the Mirror part 3
episodes.logline: In this improv horror episode, fire spreads and choices spiral out of control in this actual play one-shot finale. Dreams blur with reality as allies and enemies both reveal unexpected sides. Will everyone make it back out, and if so will they be happy living with the forbidden knowledge of cosmic horrors?

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Right Stuff:The Right Stuff part 1
episodes.logline: A boy band called The Other Side hits the road after a mall signing. Between fame, rivalry, and an ambitious manager, the guys are already cracking before the real weirdness starts.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Right Stuff:The Right Stuff part 2
episodes.logline: The band stumbles deeper into the trees and finds a girl who really shouldn’t be where she is. They try to help, then detour to a tiny town with a very quiet church because that should be safe.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Right Stuff:The Right Stuff part 3
episodes.logline: The band heads into a remote town hoping to help a girl in trouble. As tensions rise and trust cracks, the group tries to stick together even as the world around them stops making sense.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Worst Gift Ever Given:The Worst Gift Ever Given part 1
episodes.episode: The Worst Gift Ever Given part 1
episodes.logline: A festive title inspires an improvised Call of Cthulhu story set during Saturnalia in Imperial Rome. Prophecy, sacrifice, and cosmic horror! Merry Saturnalia, I guess.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Worst Gift Ever Given:The Worst Gift Ever Given part 2
episodes.episode: The Worst Gift Ever Given part 2
episodes.logline: A holiday investigation drifts off the rails as the group uncovers something deeply wrong. Visions and warnings begin to pile up, pointing toward a larger pattern no one can quite name yet. What is this "gift" anyway?

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:The Worst Gift Ever Given:The Worst Gift Ever Given part 3
episodes.episode: The Worst Gift Ever Given part 3
episodes.logline: A strange case escalates quickly as unsettling visions and coincidences begin to stack up. By the time the shape of the "gift" becomes clear, it’s already far too late to simply walk away.
A very normal Call of Cthulhu game in the ruins of the world. Treasure Island is home but probably smells terrible.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Until the Washing is Done:Until the Washing is Done 1/2
episodes.logline: A routine armor pickup turns weirdly tense when the washer’s guild starts acting off. The party gets pulled into something deeper than dirty laundry.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:Until the Washing is Done:Until the Washing is Done 2/2
episodes.logline: The party heads deeper into the washer’s guild tunnels and things get honestly kind of wetter than expected.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:What Makes That Windmill Bleed So?:What Makes That Windmill Bleed So? part 1
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/What Makes That Windmill Bleed So.lua
episodes.show: What Makes That Windmill Bleed So?
episodes.episode: What Makes That Windmill Bleed So? part 1
episodes.logline: Paris, 1890-something? The Moulin Rouge burns bright with music, lust, and secrets. Our investigators tumble through the velvet haze of Montmartre. An ex-dancer, an eccentric poet, a music box artisan, and a guy named Bill Buckaroo. What begins as backstage chaos soon drips into something much darker.

episodes.id: CastDataPTR:What Makes That Windmill Bleed So?:What Makes That Windmill Bleed So? part 2
episodes.sourceFile: Modules/CastDataPTR/What Makes That Windmill Bleed So.lua
episodes.show: What Makes That Windmill Bleed So?
episodes.episode: What Makes That Windmill Bleed So? part 2
episodes.logline: Our investigators tumble deeper into Cécile Swann’s world, where sanity stretches thin. What begins as a strange investigation plunges through impossible spaces. Somewhere between love, madness, and creation, they may finally discover what makes the windmill bleed.
